headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on CenterPoint Energy, Lowers Price Target to $47
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   maintains CenterPoint Energy (NYSE:CNP) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $48 to $47.
